items.body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage — Needs Manual Review

<details>
<summary>🏷️ Label Decision</summary>

- **Candidate labels considered:**
  - `Mgmt` + `Consumption - Budget` — the issue's Sample 1 focuses on budgets, but the issue scope is broader
  - `Mgmt` + `Consumption - UsageDetailsAndExport` — Sample 2 focuses on usage details, but again not the full scope
  - `Mgmt` + `Consumption - Billing` — not clearly the primary focus
  - No plain `Consumption` label (without sub-qualifier) exists in the repository (confirmed via label search returning 0 results)
- **Confidence blockers:** The issue covers the entire `Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption` package, spanning multiple sub-areas (budgets, usage details, marketplace, charges, reservations). Multiple service labels (`Consumption - Budget`, `Consumption - UsageDetailsAndExport`, `Consumption - Billing`, `Consumption - RIandShowBack`) are all plausible — cannot narrow to exactly one without ambiguity. There is no generic `%Consumption` label in the repo.
- **Outcome:** Applied `needs-triage` — could not confidently predict a single service label due to ambiguity across Consumption sub-areas.
</details>

<details>
<summary>👥 Owner Routing</summary>

- **CODEOWNERS scan:** Owner lookup was not performed — label prediction did not reach confidence threshold.
</details>
